title: Quick Math 60
description: 60-second arithmetic rush! Build exam-level speed calculation for SSC, Banking, Railways. 4 difficulty levels from Easy to Expert.
controls: Tap the correct option. Build combos for bonus points.

title: Sudoku Pro
description: Classic 9x9 Sudoku with 4 difficulty levels. Features hints, pencil marks, mistake counter, and auto-save. Train your logical reasoning.
controls: Tap a cell, then tap a number 1-9. Use pencil mode for notes.

title: GK Blitz
description: 260+ verified General Knowledge MCQs for UPSC, SSC, Banking exams. Pick a category: History, Geography, Polity, Economy, Science, Culture.
controls: Tap the correct option. Blitz mode: 60s. Practice mode: explanations shown.

title: Fruit Slice Master
description: Slice flying fruits with lightning-fast swipes! Juicy physics, combo multipliers, and explosive bombs. 100% original HTML5 game.
controls: Swipe or click and drag to slice fruits. Avoid bombs!

title: Snake.Go
description: A neon retro snake reimagined! Glide across a pixel grid, eat glowing apples, and grow longer. Mobile-friendly with swipe controls.
controls: Arrow keys or swipe to change direction

title: Pixel Flap
description: Tap to flap your wings and weave through endless pipes! Classic side-scroller with pixel-art charm and buttery-smooth physics.

title: Coin Catcher
description: Catch falling coins and gems in your basket while dodging bombs! Build combos for massive score multipliers.
controls: Drag or Arrow keys to move the basket

title: Brick Smash
description: Smash through colorful neon bricks with a bouncing ball. Progress through levels with increasing difficulty and multi-hit bricks.
controls: Drag or Arrow keys to move paddle. Tap / Space to launch.

title: 2048 Merge
description: Slide and merge numbered tiles to reach 2048! The iconic addictive puzzle with silky-smooth swipe controls.
controls: Arrow keys or swipe to slide tiles

title: Memory Flip
description: Flip cards and match pairs to clear the board. Choose 4x4 or 6x6 difficulty and beat your best time.
controls: Tap or click cards to flip and match pairs

title: Neon Blaster
description: Top-down neon space shooter! Blast through waves of enemy ships, dodge incoming fire, and survive as long as possible.
controls: Drag or WASD/Arrows to move. Auto-fire enabled.

title: Color Sort
description: Sort colored liquids into matching tubes! A relaxing yet challenging puzzle with hundreds of levels. Plan your pours carefully — one wrong move and you're stuck!
controls: Tap a tube to pick up liquid, tap another to pour. Undo button available.

title: Stack Tower
description: Tap to stack blocks and build the tallest tower! Time your drops perfectly for PERFECT combos. Beautiful 3D isometric visuals with a shifting sky.
controls: Tap or click to drop the block at the right moment.

title: Bubble Shooter
description: Aim and shoot colored bubbles to match 3 or more! Classic bubble shooter with satisfying chain reactions and wall-bounce trick shots.
controls: Aim with mouse/touch, tap or click to shoot. Match 3+ same-color bubbles.

title: Block Drop
description: Classic block-stacking puzzle! Arrange falling tetrominoes to clear lines. Speed increases as you level up. How long can you survive?
controls: Arrow keys or swipe to move. Tap or Up arrow to rotate. Swipe down for hard drop.
